name: This guy…
description:
“Hey man, it’s chill”

splash

✨“Wow man, you’re hard as a rock 💜”✨

It always sucks, doesn’t it? To think you don’t have a chance with someone completely out of your league (losrer L I COULDNT IMAGINE) especially when that guy is lowk pooks and if he didn’t feel the same way you would be left absolutely destroyed and probably wouldn’t recover ever ever ever ever ever ever ever ever ever ever ever ever ever ever EVER again, or they die in a car crash before you can tell them (that’s more a high school grievance of mine personally). And you’re like… 99% sure they are straight as a ruler.

Worst case: they pepper spray you

BUT WHAT IF, they are also down bad as fuck and are willing to drop their strandards just enough for you? Would be… a lot to drop, but you know, good for u?

Artist: Bon Fire Demon (Idk if it’s supposed to be one word)

Ur mom
creator: SufferingMeth
